changes.title: Update Duplicate Queue CTA
changes.description: Change CTA from 'Review Duplicates' to 'Review Duplicate Candidates'

properties.rationale: More specific language clarifies we're reviewing candidate pairs, not final decisions

changes.title: Update Export Button CTA
changes.description: Change button text from 'Export Console' to 'Open Export Console'

properties.rationale: Verb 'Open' clarifies this is navigation to the Export Console, not immediate export

changes.title: Ensure Read-Only Note Visibility
changes.description: Verify read-only note is visible directly beneath the three queue cards

properties.text_content: Dashboard is read-only. Decisions happen in review screens.
properties.rationale: Reinforces read-only constraint at the primary action area

changes.title: Improve Recent Actions Audit Wording
changes.description: Make Recent Actions wording clearly historical/audit-oriented

examples: Review decision: normalization accepted · John Smith · operator@example.com · 2m ago
Review decision: household suggestion deferred · operator@example.com · 8m ago
Review decision: duplicate pair marked different · Jane Doe · operator@example.com · 12m ago
properties.rationale: Clarifies these are past review decisions, not current dashboard actions

changes.title: Improve Safety Badge Visibility
changes.description: Slightly improve visibility of 'HUMAN-IN-LOOP · NO AUTO-APPLY' badge

properties.rationale: Makes badge more scannable while maintaining it as secondary to title

next_step: Recapture iteration-003 with final polish applied
